provincial_coordination_en: A total of 134 alerts were raised, 111 were investigated (82.8%, the lowest rate), and 86 were validated. For contact tracing, 4,118 contacts were under follow-up, with 1,779 seen (43.2%). In-depth investigations were conducted around confirmed cases in affected health zones. A total of 210 contacts completed their 21-day follow-up and were discharged.

Support continued for affected provinces under the Incident Manager and IMS in Bunia. A field visit to Mongbwalu HZ included partners (OCHA, UNDP, WFP, UNICEF, WHO). Training ended for 23 health zone chiefs (zonal approach) and community animators (surveillance).
